mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_version t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.id},'%')
AND t.version like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.version},'%')
AND t.title like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.title},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.content},'%')
AND t.app_url like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.appUrl},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.status},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_version t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.id},'%')
AND t.version like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.version},'%')
AND t.title like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.title},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.content},'%')
AND t.app_url like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.appUrl},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{castleVersionEntity.status},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_version t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
SELECT t.* FROM castle_version t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 and t.status = 1 order by create_time desc limit 0,1
